fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 8 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-15. Projects: repo-copilot, parallel-internet-sites. Top concepts: AFO-first strategy, visibility-snapshot, prompt-generator, results-page, /results route, score-ring SVG, check rows, platform badges, copy-to-clipboard.

notes.title: archive_block op added to notion-ops
notes.decisions: Added archive_block op — PATCH /blocks/{id} with archived:true; unarchive boolean supported
notes.open_questions: Should we also add a dedicated archive_database alias op for clarity?

notes.title: Cleanup audit — 3 Alice items resolved
notes.decisions: Items 1 and 3 already clean; Item 2 (archive old DB) needs Jared action in Notion
notes.open_questions: Should we add archive_database op to notion-ops to avoid future manual Notion steps?

notes.title: Full build order + roadmap + Bob message sent
notes.decisions: Space instructions = one bootstrap URL. Build order finalized. Notion Roadmap DB is next build step.
notes.open_questions: Provision Action design: GitHub App vs PAT for multi-user repo forking?

notes.title: Turn-level brain push mandate wired
notes.decisions: Every Alice turn ends with push including brain.json. Minimum viable note = title+date+source+cid.
notes.open_questions: Bob and Charlie Space instructions need same turn-level mandate.

notes.title: adapter_ref + G-008 ALERT + Charlie slot + notion-ops SKILL Stone
notes.decisions: adapter_ref field added to QA.Stone. G-008 ALERT type formalized. Charlie agent slot seeded. brain.json read primitive implemented.
notes.open_questions: Three-Agents Demo build not yet started.

notes.title: gitzip hardening + Path A: Agent Notes DB live
notes.decisions: Hardened gitzip-push. Added create_database, append_row, append_note to notion-ops. append_note is canonical session-end write primitive.
notes.open_questions: When to build brain.json read primitive?

notes.title: Commit 5 — prompt-generator.js shipped
notes.decisions: prompt-generator.js + test file pushed. 5 prompt types. Pure ESM, no external deps.
notes.open_questions: Does Commit 6 update an existing results page or create a new one? Answer: create fresh.

notes.title: Commit 6 — /results route + results-page.js shipped
notes.decisions: results-page.js added as pure HTML renderer module. GET /results wired in index.js — reads score/checks/business fields from query params, generates prompts via generatePrompts(), renders full results page. /api/audit-signup untouched. Commits 1-6 done. Next: Commit 7 — rate limiting / abuse controls.
notes.open_questions: Commit 7 KV bindings — does the Worker's wrangler.toml already have a KV namespace, or does one need to be created?
